name: spec-flow
description: Installer for the spec-flow Codex workflow. Installs the workflow skills and translates bundled Claude subagents into Codex custom-agent TOML.

interface.shortDescription: Install a spec-driven workflow with Codex custom agents.
interface.longDescription: Spec Flow installs reusable Codex skills plus custom agents for a spec -> design -> implement -> review -> archive development workflow.
